name: super-browser
description: Universal browser and computer automation plugin for agents. Includes specialist skills, a routing CLI, and an MCP server for choosing the right browser, proxy, authenticated session, or desktop backend.

interface.shortDescription: Route agent browser and computer automation to the right tool.
interface.longDescription: Super Saiyan Browser gives agents a documented plugin, CLI, and MCP interface for browser automation. Routing is capability-first (auth, anti-bot, CAPTCHA, profiles, proxy injection, fleet, desktop, raw HTTP) with an escalation rank as the cost tie-breaker: local Playwright and Browser Use (rank 1), Hyperbrowser/Airtop cloud scale (rank 2), Steel hosted Chromium (rank 3), Orgo desktop (rank 4), and raw HTTP to Decodo on a separate lane, with specialist skills and approval policy for external writes.
